children.name:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help you copy a message. However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.
  ...
  Expected: I'm ready to help you copy a message. However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.
  ...
assert "I'm ready to help you copy a message. However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.\n\nCould you please provide:\n1. The message you'd like me to copy\n2. Where you'd like it copied to (a file, a specific format, etc.)\n\nFor example:\nCopy text to a new file\nCopy and format text in a specific way\nCopy content from one location to another\n\nPlease share the message content and I'll assist you right away!" == "I'm ready to help you copy a message. However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message you'd like me to copy\nWhere you'd like it copied to (a file, a specific format, etc.)\nFor example:\nCopy text to a new file\nCopy and format text in a specific way\nCopy content from one location to another\nPlease share the message content and I'll assist you right away!"
  
    I'm ready to help you copy a message. However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.
  + 
    Could you please provide:
  - The message you'd like me to copy
  + 1. The message you'd like me to copy
  ? +++
  - Where you'd like it copied to (a file, a specific format, etc.)
  + 2. Where you'd like it copied to (a file, a specific format, etc.)
  ? +++
  + 
    For example:
    Copy text to a new file
    Copy and format text in a specific way
    Copy content from one location to another
  + 
    Please share the message content and I'll assist you right away!
